translations.text: The Day of Decision is the time appointed for all;

text_qpc_hafs: يَوۡمَ لَا يُغۡنِي مَوۡلًى عَن مَّوۡلٗى شَيۡـٔٗا وَلَا هُمۡ يُنصَرُونَ ٤١
text_uthmani: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًى شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ

translations.text: a Day when no friend can take another’s place.

text_qpc_hafs: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ ٤٢
text_uthmani: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

translations.text: No one will receive any help except for those to whom God shows mercy: He is the Mighty, the Merciful Lord.
The tree of Zaqqum
will be food for the sinners:
[hot] as molten metal, it boils in their bellies
like seething water.
‘Take him! Thrust him into the depths of Hell!

text_qpc_hafs: ثُمَّ صُبُّواْ فَوۡقَ رَأۡسِهِۦ مِنۡ عَذَابِ ٱلۡحَمِيمِ ٤٨
text_uthmani: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ

translations.text: Pour scalding water over his head as punishment!’
‘Taste this, you powerful, respected man!

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّ هَٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمۡتَرُونَ ٥٠
text_uthmani: إِنّ�� هَـٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ

translations.text: This is what you doubted.’
But those mindful of God will be in a safe place
amid Gardens and springs,
clothed in silk and fine brocade, facing one another:
so it will be. We shall wed them to maidens with large, dark eyes.
Secure and contented, they will call for every kind of fruit.

text_qpc_hafs: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا ٱلۡمَوۡتَ إِلَّا ٱلۡمَوۡتَةَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰۖ وَوَقَىٰهُمۡ عَذَابَ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ ٥٦
text_uthmani: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا ٱلْمَوْتَ إِلَّا ٱلْمَوْتَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ ۖ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ

translations.text: After the one death they will taste death no more. God will guard them from the torment of Hell,

text_qpc_hafs: فَضۡلٗا مِّن رَّبِّكَۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلۡفَوۡزُ ٱلۡعَظِيمُ ٥٧
text_uthmani: فَضْلًا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ

translations.text: a bounty from your Lord. That is the supreme triumph.
We have made this Quran easy to understand- in your own language [Prophet]- so that they may take heed.
So wait; the disbelievers too are waiting.
